meta.title: MJ Barbershop — Mobile Barber in Abu Dhabi
meta.description: Premium mobile barber serving Al Shamkha and Abu Dhabi. Classic cuts, beard work and hot-towel shaves — brought to your door. Book on WhatsApp.

services.heading: Services & Pricing
services.subheading: Transparent pricing, no surprises — just great work.

booking.name: Full name
booking.noSlots: We're closed that day — please pick another date.
booking.successBody: Thank you — we'll confirm your appointment shortly on WhatsApp.
booking.errorBody: Your booking didn't go through. Please try again — or book directly on WhatsApp.
booking.errPhone: Enter a valid UAE mobile (05x xxx xxxx)
booking.noTimes: No times available this day — pick another date.
booking.summaryNote: Free rescheduling — manage your booking anytime with the reference we give you. We confirm on WhatsApp within minutes.
booking.whatsappDirect: Skip the form — message us on WhatsApp directly
booking.successManageHint: Keep this reference — you can reschedule or cancel with it in “Manage a booking”.

manage.title: Manage your booking
manage.intro: Enter your booking reference and the phone number you booked with.
manage.notFound: No booking found — double-check the reference and phone number.
manage.rescheduled: Your booking was moved — we'll reconfirm on WhatsApp.
manage.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? This cannot be undone.
manage.notChangeable: This booking can no longer be changed online — message us on WhatsApp.
manage.error: Something went wrong — please try again.

location.heading: Where We Serve
location.subheading: Based in Al Shamkha — we come to you across Abu Dhabi.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subheading: Questions, group bookings, or just want to say hello — we're one message away.

contact.error: Couldn't send your message. Please try WhatsApp instead.

footer.blurb: A premium barbershop in Dubai. Classic craft, modern precision.
